mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ops_historical_incident_memory ( memory_id, diagnosis_id, service_name, alert_rule, severity, symptom_summary, evidence_summary, root_cause_category, root_cause_summary, remediation_summary, confidence, review_status, time_window_json, tags, similarity_text, source_record_json, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{memoryId}, #{diagnosisId}, #{serviceName}, #{alertRule}, #{severity}, #{symptomSummary}, #{evidenceSummary}, #{rootCauseCategory}, #{rootCauseSummary}, #{remediationSummary}, #{confidence}, #{reviewStatus}, #{timeWindowJson}, #{tags}, #{similarityText}, #{sourceRecordJson}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE service_name = VALUES(service_name), alert_rule = VALUES(alert_rule), severity = VALUES(severity), symptom_summary = VALUES(symptom_summary), evidence_summary = VALUES(evidence_summary), root_cause_category = VALUES(root_cause_category), root_cause_summary = VALUES(root_cause_summary), remediation_summary = VALUES(remediation_summary), confidence = VALUES(confidence), review_status = VALUES(review_status), time_window_json = VALUES(time_window_json), tags = VALUES(tags), similarity_text = VALUES(similarity_text), source_record_json = VALUES(source_record_json), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
